description_long: This is a compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short, metallic barrel and a wooden pistol grip. The barrels are cylindrical and robust, with a matte, slightly weathered finish, and the break-action hinge is visible beneath the barrels. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with a simple, utilitarian design. A single shotgun shell is shown next to the firearm in some views, highlighting its ammunition type and scale. The wooden grip is dark and ergonomically shaped, contrasting with the metallic body. The overall appearance suggests a rugged, utilitarian weapon suitable for close-quarters use.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short metal barrel and a dark wooden pistol grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and break-action mechanism.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the twin barrels, break-action hinge, and a shotgun shell placed beside the weapon.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the short, double barrels, wooden pistol grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the open ends of the two barrels and the shell, emphasizing the side-by-side configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with the shotgun shell positioned above the barrels, showing the grip and action mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, short barrels with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, smooth contour and no finger grooves
